# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

pub zenjxl::ValidationError::GenericQualityOutOfRange::value: f32
pub zenjxl::ValidationError::NoiseInLosslessMode

pub zenjxl::JxlInfo::min_nits: f32
pub zenjxl::JxlInfo::orientation: u8

pub zenjxl::JxlInfo::relative_to_max_display: bool
pub zenjxl::JxlInfo::width: u32
pub zenjxl::JxlInfo::xmp: core::option::Option<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>

pub fn zenjxl::decode(&[u8], core::option::Option<&zenjxl::JxlLimits>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<zenjxl::JxlDecodeOutput, whereat::at::At<zenjxl::JxlError>>

pub fn zenjxl::probe(&[u8]) -> core::result::Result<zenjxl::JxlInfo, whereat::at::At<zenjxl::JxlError>>
